creator: acs@css.tuu.utas.edu.au
text:
When you run quiz Shakespeare-lines character eventually (after a random number of questions it dies with:

quiz: unmatched alternator in regexp }:Hamlet{ III-i}:Hamlet

Fix: 

Presumable the bug is in /usr/src/games/quiz/datfiles/bard but I dont have time to look atm.
How-To-Repeat: 
type:

quiz Shakespeare-lines character. You may have to get a lot wrong and pass a lot...I have no way of testing it when you get the questions right :-|
